info.title: FinGuide / Финансовый капитал API
info.description: Backend/frontend contract for the financial planning product reconstructed from the Figma Make mockup. Base path: /api/v1. Excel model analytics are documented in docs/model-analytics.md.

get.summary: Get full normalized current plan state

put.summary: Replace current plan state, used for migration/import

get.summary: Get budget method, envelopes and computed spending

post.summary: Generate envelopes from current expenses with buffer
Create scenario from blank plan, clone or adjustments
Import JSON/CSV parsed client-side or server-side

get.summary: Get projection assumptions imported from UI or Excel model
Rich yearly cashflow projection based on the Excel model
get.description: Returns income, expense, goal-spending, annual savings and accumulated capital per year. API outflows are positive; netSavings = income - expenses - goalExpenses.

get.summary: Pension projection with preserve-capital and spend-down variants

desiredMonthlyExpensesCurrentPrices.description: Excel model row: desired retirement spending in current prices.

startYear.description: Derived/imported active start year; startDate remains canonical for day precision.

endYear.description: Derived/imported active end year; endDate remains canonical for day precision.

growthSchedule.description: Optional per-year growth rates from the Excel model. Overrides growthPct for listed years.

startYear.description: Derived/imported active start year; startDate remains canonical for day precision.

endYear.description: Derived/imported active end year; endDate remains canonical for day precision.

growthSchedule.description: Optional per-year growth rates from the Excel model. Overrides growthPct for listed years.

savedAmount.description: denormalized current saved amount; server can also derive it from contributions

plannedAmount.description: For recurring goal-spending lines from the Excel model.

ratePct.description: Percent points. Example: 6 means 6% and is converted to 0.06 by calculation code.

investmentReturnPct.description: Nominal annual return in percent points. Excel sample: 6.

sourceModel.description: Optional import/source marker, e.g. uploaded Excel model checksum.
